items.title: LeBron James selects his next team: Latest updates, rumors, news
items.summary: Any moment now we could be receiving alerts from X, formerly Twitter, about where LeBron James chooses to play next season.We know the teams involved in the conversation surrounding James' decision: Cleveland Cavaliers, Golden State Warriors, Miami Heat, Philadelphia 76ers, Denver Nuggets and Minnesota Timberwolves.Multiple reports have concluded that there are truly three teams in contention between the Cavs, Sixers and Heat. The Warriors feel like a pipe dream but also remain a team to look out for that could really shift the narrative. James and his camp have all the information they need, according to USA TODAY Sports' Lorenzo Reyes. Now, he just weighs out all of his options.As James continues to breakdown those options and select his team, rumors are still flying. Speculation is rampant.Here's the latest news, updates and whispers about the LeBron James Decision 4.0:Is this…

items.title: Mavericks need consistency from Morez Johnson Jr.
items.summary: LAS VEGAS, NEVADA - JULY 15: (Editors Note: Tonal effects have been applied to this image) Morez Johnson Jr. #14 of the Dallas Mavericks poses for a portrait during the 2026 NBA Rookie Photo Shoot at UNLV on July 15, 2026 in Las Vegas, Nevada. (Photo by Carmen Mandato/Getty Images) | Getty Images Dallas Mavericks rookie Morez Johnson Jr. is leaving the Las Vegas Summer League with a mixed bag of tape to look over until the start of training camp.Johnson started off hot in Las Vegas but eventually cooled down, which isn’t what Mavericks fans want to see. ESPN analyst Ben Golliver listed Johnson as the most inconsistent rookie at the Las Vegas Summer League.“Johnson’s debut was a sight to behold: 27 points, eight rebounds, three assists, three steals and two blocks against the Golden State Warriors. As that line suggests, the No. 9 pick was a wrecking ball on both sides of the court.…

items.title: YouTube Gold: An HD Look At Larry Bird
items.summary: BOSTON - 1990: Isiah Thomas #11 of the Detroit Pistons passes against Larry Bird #33 and Dennis Johnson #3 of the Boston Celtics during a game played in 1990 at the Boston Garden in Boston, Massachusetts. NOTE TO USER: User expressly acknowledges and agrees that, by downloading and or using this photograph, User is consenting to the terms and conditions of the Getty Images License Agreement. Mandatory Copyright Notice: Copyright 1990 NBAE (Photo by Dick Raphael/NBAE via Getty Images) | NBAE via Getty Images We’ve talked a lot about Larry Bird in this space, largely because Bird had a genius for basketball that is exceedingly rare. A lot of people think that Bird was too slow and couldn’t jump, and that he wouldn’t be able to play today. People like JJ Redick, for one, who really should know better (Redick said that he didn’t think Bird was a top-five all-time three-point shooter).…

items.title: NBA Summer League takeaways: an outstanding top four, a Warriors gem and a Cavaliers steal
items.summary: Yaxel Lendeborg helped the Warriors to the Summer League Final. Photograph: John Locher/AP1) The top four are as good as advertisedThe hype heading into this year’s draft was tremendous, and through the small sample size of 10 or so days in the Las Vegas summer heat, this year’s class has lived up to its billing.AJ Dybantsa, now a Washington Wizard, looked every bit the No 1 overall pick in his Summer League debut, where he bested the player drafted directly behind him, Darryn Peterson. This was notable, as Peterson had won the pair’s previous head to head matchups, and the noise was starting to swell that perhaps the Wizards had made the wrong selection with the No 1 pick. But Dybantsa showed his high ceiling, looking every bit the crafty and athletic offensive engine he has been touted as. Peterson, to his credit, also had a solid Summer League outing, especially in the California…

Vieira had served as president of the nation since 1984, and was not especially popular.Mané had been suspended earlier that year for dereliction of duty. items.title: Klay Thompson fan interaction sparks rumors of Golden State Warriors reunion
items.summary: Fans always have a difficult time seeing their favorite players skip town for a new team, new beginning or more money. And even more so when their favorite player is a four-time NBA champion such as Klay Thompson. Thompson was drafted by the Golden State Warriors with the 11th overall pick in the 2011 NBA Draft. He went on to help them capture four titles on his way to becoming known as one of the greatest shooters in the history of the game, alongside Stephen Curry, as the two formed the "Splash Brothers" duo.A sour taste was left in fans' mouths as Thompson left the Bay for the South, joining the Dallas Mavericks on a three-year, $50 million contract via a six-team sign and trade on July 6, 2024.And although Thompson has since played games at Chase Center as a visitor, he still routinely received cheers from the fans in San Francisco proving he's beloved in the Bay.…

items.summary: After being one of the best performers during summer league, Arthur Kaluma is being rewarded with a roster spot on the Lakers.The Lakers have agreed to terms with Kaluma on a two-way contract, a source confirmed to the California Post on Monday after ESPN first reported the addition. The franchise will have to open up a two-way slot to make room for the signing of Kaluma.Chris Manon, Peter Suder and AK Okereke were occupying the Lakers’ two-way spots before Monday. After being one of the best performers during summer league, Arthur Kaluma is being rewarded with a roster spot on the Lakers. items.title: Knicks given surprising offseason grade after winning championship
items.summary: Apr 30, 2026; Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, USA; Philadelphia 76ers center Andre Drummond (1) reacts to his score against the Boston Celtics during the second quarter at Xfinity Mobile Arena. Mandatory Credit: Bill Streicher-Imagn Images | Bill Streicher-Imagn Images The New York Knicks are still riding the high of winning the NBA Finals over the San Antonio Spurs last month.The offseason has brought difficult choices for the team to make, despite ending a 53-year championship drought. The team said goodbye to Mitchell Robinson, who signed a three-year contract with the Boston Celtics. Because of this, CBS Sports contributor Sam Quinn gave the Knicks a C-plus for their offseason grade so far.“The Knicks will have to figure something else out at center. They don’t even have a third big yet. Maybe they find someone at training camp. Maybe they trade for someone during the season. They tried…

items.title: $3 Wilt Chamberlain Lakers jacket from 1972 NBA Finals found in thrift store sells for $89K at auction
items.summary: A warmup jacket worn by Wilt Chamberlain during the 1972 NBA Finals that was bought by a teenager for $3.07 at an Oregon thrift store sold for $89,600 at auction on Monday.Quinn Brown had been eyeing a massive bin of clothes at a Goodwill store outside Portland in January when he saw someone toss a Lakers jacket with Chamberlain’s name on it back on the pile. Brown, who resells used clothes online, quickly grabbed it.A warmup jacket worn by Wilt Chamberlain during the 1972 NBA Finals that was bought by Quinn Brown was sold for $89,600 at auction on Monday. Getty ImagesThe jacket was auctioned by Sotheby’s, which had estimated its value between $150,000 and $250,000 before bidding closed Monday. It received a total of 48 bids, according to the auction house.Described on Sotheby’s website as an “extraordinary piece of memorabilia,” the short-sleeved yellow warmup jacket was worn by…
